content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market with US indices strong overnight (+1% to +1.6%) which should support Nifty open. However, VIX at 18.30 is elevated, portfolio is already 68% deployed with -0.75% session P&L, and multiple held positions are showing small losses. With two open CNC BUY orders still pending (ADANIPOWER, NTPC), the priority is position management and letting existing orders work, not stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24450
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 FY26 beat (+35% PAT YoY), NNPA 0.13% best-in-class, stock at 52-week high on 2.4x volume. Thesis strongly intact. Setting SL at 74.50 (~6.6% below entry, below pivot R support cluster) and target 88 (fresh breakout extension). Risk-reward favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 920.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 PAT (+18%), GNPA <1%, disbursements +20.8%, JPMorgan OW TP 1000, independent TP 1143. Stock up 9%+ today on results. SL at 920 (below 20DMA/BB mid ~825 gives cushion; 920 is just below recent swing low structure). Target 1100 aligns with broker TPs."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Central bank buying strong, rupee weak, geopolitical risk elevated. SL 119 (~5% below entry, below 20DMA 121.92). Target 135 based on gold consensus range. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1560.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52-week high on 2.3x volume. Power sector strength broad. SL 1560 (~5.5% below entry, below breakout zone and 9EMA). Target 1780 (below broker consensus 2000+). Premium valuation caps conviction."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (PAT +27%, revenue +23%, volume +18%) at 52-week high. Entry at 1412 looks like a chase on post-result spike; stock has pulled back to 1388. SL 1340 (~5.2% below entry, just below post-result consolidation). Target 1500 aligns with Prabhudas TP. Rich valuation caps upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.63,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Provisional Q4: deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%, but CASA ratio slipped. Audited results April 25-27 = binary event risk within holding period. SL 990 (below 9EMA 968, ~5.6% below entry). Target 1120. Tight risk given event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "new_target": 735.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high with Q4 results April 29 catalyst. FDA audit passed (minor 483s). ICICI TP 770. SL 640 (~6% below entry, below 20DMA 625). Target 735 (pre-ICICI TP). Binary Q4 event within window."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2240.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 = major binary event in window. FMCG defensive strength today. Entry 2372 on +6% spike looks like a chase. SL 2240 (~5.6% below entry, just below post-spike consolidation/prior day close 2231). Target 2520 (below Jefferies TP 2850). Event risk limits conviction."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at 214 still working from prior session. Do not stack duplicate. Let it fill or expire. Already holding TORNTPOWER in power cluster; adding ADANIPOWER would approach cluster limit — will reassess if existing order fills."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at 404.50 still working. Do not stack. Let it fill naturally."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong defence order flow and volume breakout, but portfolio already 68% deployed with two pending orders that will push deployment higher if they fill. Deployment hysteresis rule: default NO_ACTION on new entries. Watchlist candidate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT collapse (-26% to -95%), revenue -6.5%, gear division declining. Chasing +16% gap-up after weak fundamentals is speculative. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 miss on both revenue and margin, IT sector tariff overhang, Infosys results today could extend sector weakness. Falling knife — avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bullish thesis (Jefferies/MS TP 240-258), but portfolio too deployed to add energy exposure. Watchlist."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PSUBNKBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already hold MAHABANK giving direct PSU bank exposure. Adding ETF would stack cluster risk. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NTPC_NEW",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Covered by existing pending NTPC order above."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Set protective SL below recent breakout zone; Q4 beat thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 920.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong results; SL below recent swing structure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; wide SL below 20DMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1560.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout confirmed; SL below breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Set SL below post-result consolidation; bought on spike so respect risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 event risk in window; tight SL. Consider trimming pre-result if price deteriorates."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 640.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 event April 29; SL below 20DMA cluster."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2240.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 event April 30 is binary; respect SL below post-spike consolidation."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ZENTEC, GAIL, PSUBNKBEES remain on watch. Will consider entries only if (a) pending ADANIPOWER/NTPC orders fail to fill and cancel out, or (b) existing positions are trimmed/stopped out creating capital headroom. ELECON and PERSISTENT dropped from interest — weak fundamentals / falling knife. AUROPHARMA/MANAPPURAM/BAJFINANCE/AXISBANK/INFY/HCLTECH no data provided — will reassess next pulse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed with 2 pending BUY orders that could push deployment to ~78% if filled. All 8 CNC positions had zero SL/target set at entry — today's priority is installing proper risk management on every position. Once SLs are live, focus shifts to letting pending orders work and NOT adding new exposure. Multiple positions have binary Q4 events within holding window (AUBANK Apr 25-27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — event cluster risk is real, will monitor for pre-event trimming if unrealized losses deepen. No new entries today per deployment hysteresis rule."
}
